title: The Secret Of Cacklefur Castle
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is kidnapped by Creepella to a spooky castle, where a surprise adoption warms even his frightened fur! 🏰

q.en: Who takes Geronimo to Cacklefur Castle against his will?
q.zh: 是谁违背杰罗尼摩的意愿，把他带去了卡克福尔城堡？

explain.en: Creepella shows up in her hearse, catches Geronimo trying to escape in disguise, and drives him to the castle, calling it a mousenapping.
explain.zh: 克里普拉开着灵车出现，抓到正乔装逃跑的杰罗尼摩，把他塞进车里带去了城堡，自己说是“老鼠绑架”。

q.en: In which valley does Cacklefur Castle sit?
q.zh: 卡克福尔城堡坐落在哪个山谷？

options.en: The Valley of the Vain Vampires
The Valley of the Happy Hamsters

explain.en: Creepella tells Geronimo the castle is in the Valley of the Vain Vampires, on a mountain shaped like a giant skull.
explain.zh: 克里普拉告诉杰罗尼摩，城堡在虚荣吸血鬼谷，坐落在一座像巨型骷髅的山上。

q.en: What is the name of the sharp-toothed plant that guards the castle door?
q.zh: 看守城堡大门、长着尖牙的植物叫什么名字？

explain.en: The watch plant's nickname is Chompers; it bites off one of Geronimo's buttons and even gulps down his cell phone.
explain.zh: 那株看门植物的外号叫“咬咬”；它咬掉了杰罗尼摩的一颗纽扣，还一口吞下了他的手机。

q.en: What does the butler Boneham say when asked to take care of Geronimo?
q.zh: 管家邦纳姆被吩咐照顾杰罗尼摩时，说了什么？

explain.en: When Creepella asks Boneham to take care of Geronimo, the butler replies, 'I will do my worst, Miss Creepella.'
explain.zh: 当克里普拉让邦纳姆照顾杰罗尼摩时，管家回答：“我会尽力使坏，克里普拉小姐。”

q.en: What does Chef Stewrat throw into his stew 'for a little bit of flavor'?
q.zh: 炖鼠大厨为了“提一点味”，把什么扔进了他的炖菜里？

explain.en: Chef Stewrat removes one of his smelly socks and tosses it into the pot, saying 'Just a little bit of flavor,' then pulls it out.
explain.zh: 炖鼠大厨脱下自己一只发臭的袜子丢进锅里，说“就提一点味”，然后又把袜子捞了出来。

q.en: What scary little creature is hidden in Madame Latomb's hairdo?
q.zh: 拉通布夫人的头发里藏着什么可怕的的小东西？

explain.en: Madame Latomb's hairstyle hides her ferocious were-canary; a little yellow bird pops out and growls at Geronimo.
explain.zh: 拉通布夫人的发型里藏着她那只凶猛的狼金丝雀；一只小黄鸟从她头发里钻出来，对着杰罗尼摩怒吼。

q.en: What kind of pet is Kafka, the beloved Cacklefur family animal?
q.zh: 卡克福尔一家心爱的宠物卡夫卡是什么动物？

options.en: A cockroach that barks like a dog
options.zh: 一只会像狗一样叫的蟑螂

explain.en: Kafka is the family's faithful pet cockroach; he sits on his hind legs and barks 'ARF! ARF!' like a dog.
explain.zh: 卡夫卡是这家人忠实的宠物蟑螂；他后腿站立，像狗一样“汪！汪！”地叫。

q.en: What is 'The Thing' that lives in the castle moat?
q.zh: 住在城堡护城河里的“那个东西”到底是什么？

options.en: A mysterious creature that eats anything
options.zh: 一只会吃掉一切神秘生物

explain.en: The Thing lives in the muddy moat, is enormous and very shy, and eats whatever crosses its path; its burp shakes the castle.
explain.zh: “那个东西”住在泥泞的护城河里，体型巨大又非常害羞，会吃掉任何经过的东西；它的打嗝声震得城堡直晃。

q.en: At the will reading, which family member surprises everyone by being alive?
q.zh: 在宣读遗嘱时，哪位家人活着出现、让所有人都大吃一惊？

options.zh: 克里普拉的祖父弗兰肯斯坦教授

explain.en: Everyone thought Professor Frankenstein had died, but he appears alive, saying he fell asleep in Nightmare Wood and a bat's pee woke him.
explain.zh: 大家都以为弗兰肯斯坦教授死了，可他活着出现了，说自己是在噩梦森林里睡着了，被一只蝙蝠撒尿在鼻子上才醒来。

q.en: What do the Cacklefurs do when they find a crying orphan baby at the drawbridge?
q.zh: 当卡克福尔一家在吊桥边发现一个哭泣的孤儿宝宝时，他们做了什么？

options.en: Adopt him and name him Baby
options.zh: 收养了他，并给他起名叫“宝宝”

options.en: Give him to Geronimo as a pet
options.zh: 把他送给杰罗尼摩当宠物

explain.en: Every Cacklefur raises a paw to adopt the orphan; they vote and name him Baby, saying their family secret is love.
explain.zh: 每个卡克福尔都举起爪子同意收养这个孤儿；他们投票决定收养他，并起名叫“宝宝”，说家族的秘密就是爱。
